text: I feel as though I am entering a liminal zone—glass, neon, and open space create an atmosphere of anticipation and sleek detachment. Inside, the bold R+D lettering and immersive colors invite curiosity, yet the deliberate design feels like both an invitation and a test. I am aware of my own presence and the promise of innovation here, yet something in the sterile order leaves me questioning whether I am a participant or an observer in this experiment of human connection and knowledge.
